local_rigour_init_shim.value: This workspace cannot use the npm package named `rigour` directly because it exposes no bin entry, so `npx rigour init` fails under npm 11. A local file-based npm devDependency named `rigour-cli-shim` provides the `rigour` executable and unblocks Rigour MCP auto-initialization. Keep package.json, tools/rigour-cli/, and rigour.yml in place if Rigour tools are needed.
